<!-- source-snippet repo="cn-quickstart" path="sdk/docs/sharable/sdk/quickstart/operate/deploy-quickstart-to-devnet.rst" commit="5327209dd3223f985ed91803787e3b18c8ad77cb" snippet="cn-quickstart-rst-code-sdk-docs-sharable-sdk-quickstart-operate-deploy-quickstart-to-devnet-yaml-689" location="lines:689-709" -->
```yaml
   nginx:
      image: "nginx:${NGINX_VERSION}"
      volumes:
        - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf
        - ./nginx:/etc/nginx/includes
      ports:
        - "${HOST_BIND_IP:-127.0.0.1}:8080:80" # Change this line from 80:80 to 8080:80
      depends_on:
        - ans-web-ui
        - wallet-web-ui
        - validator
      restart: always
      networks:
        - ${DOCKER_NETWORK:-splice_validator}
      healthcheck:
        test: ["CMD", "service", "nginx", "status"]
        interval: 30s
        timeout: 10s
        retries: 3
        start_period: 60s

```
